mapper.select: SELECT id, qna_id, content, author_id, author_name, created_at FROM vibe.qna_answer WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.qna_answer (id, qna_id, content, author_id, author_name, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{qnaId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
